custom-tax.name: Custom Tax
custom-tax.description: Configure a custom tax calculation by providing your own APIs.

custom-shipping.name: Custom Shipping
custom-shipping.description: Configure a custom shipping calculation by providing your own APIs.

custom-payment.name: Custom Payment

sf-payments.name: Salesforce Payments
sf-payments.description: Process payments natively in Storefront Next. Salesforce Payments supports multiple payment gateways and methods.

commerce-ace-ga4.name: Commerce Ace GA4 Analytics
commerce-ace-ga4.description: Connects Storefront Next to Google Analytics 4, streaming page-view, product-view, checkout, and purchase events to the merchant's GA4 property.
